prompt: Create a hyper-realistic surreal cinematic portrait in a tall vertical 9:16 frame. In the exact center stands a young adult man, completely still and facing the camera, full body visible, wearing an all-black streetwear outfit: black hoodie with drawstrings, long open black coat, slim black pants, and gray-black-white chunky sneakers. Use a softly blurred anonymized face while keeping the head, hair, posture, and body realistic. The setting is a giant infinite seamless white room with a clean pale gray-white background and no visible walls or horizon. Above him, arrange exactly 14 visible matte black umbrellas suspended upside-down or hovering in a symmetrical grid, including cropped umbrellas at the top and side edges; show their curved handles hanging downward. Around the man, sculpt glossy gravity-defying black water into elegant flowing ribbons and splashes: one huge circular foreground wave curling around his feet, two wide horizontal waves sweeping behind his torso from left and right, two tall upward arcs rising beside his shoulders, and one lower right splash curling upward, with many small floating droplets near the arcs. The water should look heavy, reflective, translucent in places, and frozen mid-motion as if rising upward despite gravity. Lighting is soft studio lighting with high contrast black-on-white minimalism, crisp reflections on the liquid, cinematic realism, sharp clothing texture, no text, no logos, no extra people, no visible floor clutter.
